nasb.text: And he threw the pieces of silver into the temple sanctuary and departed; and he went away and hanged himself.

esv.text: And throwing down the pieces of silver into the temple, he departed, and he went and hanged himself.

cnv.text: 猶大把銀子丟進聖所，然後離開，出去吊死了。

ccb.text: 犹大把钱扔在圣殿里，出去上吊自尽了。

csbs.text: 犹大把银钱丢在圣所里就退了出来，去上吊自杀了。
